enfoque: This cycle is focused on improving the technical path, alignment, and strength of Yop Chagui, connecting it directly with Koryo line 3. The main goal is to build clean technique, better hip control, correct kicking trajectory, and a deeper understanding of the muscles, alignment, and body structure involved in the movement.
chanonaflexDias: PRE: MONDAY TO SATURDAY / LEVEL 2: MONDAY - WEDNESDAY - FRIDAY

tags: YOP CHAGUI, HIP CONTROL, TRAJECTORY, FLEXIBILITY

pateoDias: TUESDAY - THURSDAY - SATURDAY / CHOOSE ONLY 2 KICKING EXERCISES PER DAY

pateoTecnico.enfoque: Bring the knee clearly toward the chest before extending the kick. This helps the Yop Chagui keep the correct side-kick path instead of turning into a round kick.

pateoTecnico.titulo: Yop Chagui Drill 2 - Extension and Return
pateoTecnico.enfoque: Control the extension, the return of the leg, and the body line without collapsing the torso forward.

pateoTecnico.titulo: Ap + Yop + Hip Turn with Chair
pateoTecnico.enfoque: Use the chair to work Yop Chagui, hip rotation, body axis control, and the transition from Ap Chagui to Yop Chagui.
Improve the kicking path with a block, focusing on chamber, hip position, balance, and a clean side-kick line.
Improve hip opening, side-kick line, and specific flexibility for Yop Chagui without forcing pain or losing control.
Strengthen Yop Chagui control, balance, and hip stability to transfer that quality into Koryo.

poomsae.enfoque: Work on body alignment, head direction, hip control, and Yop Chagui execution on the right side.
Work on body alignment, head direction, hip control, and Yop Chagui execution on the left side.
Control timing, breathing, posture, and the clear final shape of the concentration movement.

poomsae.titulo: Chamber + Koryo Line 3 + Koryo Line 1 + Koryo Line 3
poomsae.enfoque: Integrate the chamber, Koryo line 3 structure, and clean return to the correct body axis.

apuntes: We are starting in a focused and important way with Yop Chagui and specific drills to improve technique, strength, and technical cleanliness.
This is a strong starting point because it helps us understand the muscles, alignment, and correct movement path in depth.
In the kicking section, choose only two exercises per day. Do not do all kicking exercises in one day.
The isometric exercises and ChanonaFlex routines are important, so please do them on the exact days marked in the plan.
For Yop Chagui, first build a clear knee chamber, then align the hip, and only after that extend the leg. Do not rush the kick.
If an exercise feels painful or something does not feel right, please tell me so we can adjust it safely.
notasFinales: Welcome to your new training plan. In this plan, we will work on the technical structure and deeper understanding of the movements.
If you have any questions about the exercises, or if any video does not open, please let me know.
You can always ask me anything. I am here to support you through the process.
